summary: Frontend testing of iteration 12 features: ArtistModal, Gallery Lightbox, Deposit settings, EU date format, Cancellation banner localStorage persistence

ui_bugs.issue: Date in cancellation banner shows '21.4.2026' (no leading zeros on month) instead of '21.04.2026'. toLocaleDateString('de-DE') without options omits padding. Minor cosmetic issue.

Cannot fully test gallery lightbox as test studio (studio_d052af828f1f) has no gallery images. Code review confirms lightbox is correctly implemented (setLightbox on image click, fullscreen overlay z-[200], Escape/arrow keys work).

action_items: Optional: Use toLocaleDateString('de-DE', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' }) in CustomerDashboard cancellation banner for consistent DD.MM.YYYY padding
Optional: Add gallery images to test studio to enable lightbox testing
critical_code_review_comments: StudioPage.js: Lightbox and ArtistModal both implemented correctly with AnimatePresence, keyboard handlers, and proper z-index layering
Deposit: studio.deposit_required conditional correctly controls deposit display on booking page (line 811) - no hardcoded €50 shown
Date format: All date displays use toLocaleDateString('de-DE') which produces German format (DD.M.YYYY) but without zero-padding on single-digit months
localStorage cancellation dismissal: correctly initializes from localStorage on mount and updates on dismiss
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features work: ArtistModal opens/closes with X button and Escape key, deposit toggle in StudioDashboard Profile tab shows amount input when enabled, hardcoded €50 deposit NOT shown on booking page (controlled by studio.deposit_required), cancellation banner dismisses and persists via localStorage. Gallery lightbox code is correct but test studio has no images to click. Date format uses de-DE locale (21.4.2026 style, not zero-padded months).
